Show description and title introduction

Book of Joshua about giants; giants and dragons in scripture

Exodus 18:11; God judges gods of Egypt
Deuteronomy 10:17; Psalm 95:3; God of gods means other gods exist
Word 'god' refers to spiritual beings; dominion and rule; theosis connection
Elohim used for any spiritual being; examples: Samuel's spirit called god
Exodus 21:5-6: 'bring him to the gods' referring to ancestors
Three kinds of beings called gods: angels, demons, dead people
Caller question about angels dying; answer: good angels cannot be killed, evil angels die spiritually

Caller Rafael: deepening relationship with guardian angel; prayer, awareness, angels as messengers
